description: A hospital coordination platform with three portals (User, Hospital, Admin) using three reusable intelligence engines: Urgency Classification, Load Prediction, and Surge Detection.

steps.name: Install prerequisites
steps.description: Ensure Node.js v18+, npm, and git are installed.
steps.notes: If not installed, download from nodejs.org and git-scm.com.

steps.name: Install dependencies
commands: npm install react-router-dom pocketbase recharts lucide-react react-leaflet leaflet ml-regression ml-logistic-regression

steps.name: Set up PocketBase backend
steps.notes: Keep server running; open http://127.0.0.1:8090/_/ to create admin account.

steps.name: Create PocketBase collections
steps.description: Via Admin UI or API, create collections with fields:
steps.code:
hospitals: name (text), status (select: stable/watch/critical), erWait (number), icuOccupancy (number), beds (json), location (json)
patients: name (text), condition (text), urgency (select: low/moderate/high/critical), eta (number), vitals (json), hospitalId (relation)
triageLog: patientId (relation), decisionTime (number), outcome (select: er/clinic/home), timestamp (date)
loadHistory: hour (number), dayOfWeek (number), queueLength (number), waitTime (number), icuOccupancy (number)

steps.name: Seed mock data
steps.description: Create seed.js script in frontend/src/data and run it.
commands: # paste code, then run: node data/seed.js

steps.name: Urgency Classification
Load Prediction Model
steps.description: Create lib/loadModel.js with linear regression trained on loadHistory.

steps.name: Surge Detection
Set up routing and PocketBase client
steps.description: Create lib/pocketbase.js and configure App.jsx with routes.

steps.name: User Portal
steps.description: Create SOS button, hospital cards, and surge indicator.

steps.name: Hospital Portal
steps.description: Create smart triage table and metrics.

steps.name: Admin Portal
steps.description: Show network operations with clinic list and map.

steps.name: Integrate models
steps.description: Call trainLoadModel() in App useEffect. Use urgency model in patient table if not already.

steps.name: Add surge detection to admin
steps.description: Compute and display surge level for each hospital using rules.
steps.notes: You can add a column in admin showing surge level based on icuOccupancy and erWait.

steps.name: End-to-end test
steps.description: Manually create a patient in PocketBase admin and verify updates across portals.

steps.name: UI polish
steps.description: Adjust Tailwind classes to match provided mockups exactly.

steps.name: Deploy PocketBase to Railway
steps.description: Create Dockerfile in backend folder and deploy.
steps.code:
FROM alpine:latest
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates
COPY pocketbase /usr/local/bin/pocketbase
EXPOSE 8090
CMD ["pocketbase", "serve", "--http=0.0.0.0:8090"]

steps.name: Prepare submission
steps.description: Create README with live demo links and explanation of three engines.
